prompt: In image 1, replace the background color with the dark mode background from image 2. Replace the '1' key with the number '3' with red color from image 3 scaled proportionally to match surrounding UI elements including the numbers. All other aspects of the source image should remain unchanged.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the source image. Replace its white background with the dark gray background color from image 2. On the keypad, locate the '1' key in the top-left position. Change the digit on this key from '1' to '3'. The new '3' should adopt the font, weight, and general rendering style of the surrounding numbers on the keypad in image 1, but its color must be the distinct red shade sampled from the '3' in image 3. Ensure this new '3' is proportionally sized to fit its key circle, matching the scale and alignment of adjacent numerical keys. All other elements of image 1, including the keypad layout, call button, status bar, and navigation bar, must remain completely unchanged.
objects: red digit '3' on the top-left key
green call button with phone icon
